title: Structured Quarry Hole Conditions
notes: The yellow Breakthrough control is now a general Hole Condition control for Breakthrough, Broken Rock, Mud / Clay Seam, Void, Water, or Other.
Each hole can store up to eight condition intervals with a starting depth, competent-rock resume depth, or a Continues to bottom setting.
MITHRIL automatically generates a standardized loading note while preserving anything typed manually in Notes.
Structured condition intervals are included in JSON backups and added to Drill Log CSV exports.
Hole conditions are informational only and are never subtracted from Total Rock, which remains Depth minus Overburden for loaded holes.
Dirt holes remain excluded from PDF Notes pages; m38.22 summary and GPS workflow improvements remain included.
